rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks in valid component type or implementation scopes.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks.
Use existing visible identifiers from the current component scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {**... **};` blocks.
Use `assign` only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex.
Do not invent declarations in repair; use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
